summary: Horizontal video. A re-posted Tampa Bay 28 (WFTS) local TV news segment about HSI special agent Justin Gaertner, a Marine veteran who lost both legs in Afghanistan and works on rescuing child exploitation victims using digital forensics. It is a reporter-narrated news package with anchor desk and interview footage, with no music track.
notable_text: On-screen: 'MARINE VET USES DIGITAL SKILLS TO RESCUE CHILD EXPLOITATION VICTIMS' / 'TAMPA BAY 28'.
